a:r.a:t: Introduces the client discussion by framing our perspective on the industry, and how we propose to begin
Outlines the scope and impact of the discovery project. Provides a view on commercial opportunity sizing and lever determination.
Details how McKinsey will collaborate with the client, including proposed team structure, ways of working, and the unique strengths we bring as a partner
Showcases relevant case examples of impact we have driven in similar settings
